resolved_setup.detail: Installed checkout-declared pgvector and pg8000 into the supplied isolated Letta venv.
Used only disposable Podman container letta-final-pg-20260711 with pgvector extension and documented alembic upgrade head.
Used local letta/letta-free only as the structurally required agent model handle; no message or inference endpoint was invoked.
Removed inherited OPENROUTER_API_KEY from the isolated server environment; no hosted inference was used.
A single 400-row worker timed out after partial execution without emitting its buffered sidecar; four verified 100-row public-API batches completed all indices 0-399.

unsupported_not_emulated: The public passage API has no update/history path; history is false and was not emulated.
Independent passage inserts have no native conflict relationship; conflict is false and was not emulated.
Sleeper write-admission/governance is not_supported and was not scored as ordinary insertion.
